title: The Disappearance That Stunned the Nation: The Case of Flight 370

scenes.text: A flight lost, leaving only questions in its wake.
It happened over the Indian Ocean on March 8, 2014.
Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 vanished with 239 people on board.
Extensive searches have failed to find the wreckage or answers.
scenes.label: REMAINS UNFOUND

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Indian Ocean - 2014. Flight MH370 disappeared with 239 souls on board, leaving the world questioning what happened. Follow for daily cold cases!
